twitter_thread: Roper Technologies' debt has surged 300% to $7.4B in 5 years. Can they still deliver 10% annual growth?
63% of their software revenue comes from legacy systems, which are being disrupted by AI-powered tools like Salesforce and Zendesk
Cloud-based solutions from competitors like Microsoft and Oracle are forcing Roper to cut prices by up to 20%
To stay ahead, Roper needs to invest $100M+ in AI-powered software, such as machine learning and natural language processing
Their $1.4B acquisition of Deltek added to their debt, making it harder to invest in innovation like AI-powered software
Roper's debt-to-equity ratio is now 1.4, above the industry average. Prioritizing debt reduction is crucial
What's your take on Roper Technologies' growth strategy, can they overcome their debt and competition? #roptechnologies #ai
